description: Fix genuine quality issues in the E2E test suite found during audit: extract duplicated helper, clear dangling timeouts in WebSocket connect patterns, and replace a fixed sleep with polling in lifecycle.e2e.ts.

userStories.title: Extract duplicated parseErrorJson helper to helpers.ts
userStories.description: As a platform developer, I want a single source of truth for the parseErrorJson test helper so that changes to the error response format only need updating in one place.
acceptanceCriteria: parseErrorJson is defined in e2e/helpers.ts and exported
e2e/structured-errors.e2e.ts imports parseErrorJson from ./helpers.js instead of defining it locally
e2e/sdk-fetch-errors.e2e.ts imports parseErrorJson from ./helpers.js instead of defining it locally
No duplicate parseErrorJson definitions remain in any e2e/*.ts file
userStories.notes:
The identical helper is defined at:
- e2e/structured-errors.e2e.ts:20-26
- e2e/sdk-fetch-errors.e2e.ts:19-25

Both have the same signature: `const parseErrorJson = (content: string): Record<string, unknown>`. Move to e2e/helpers.ts and add to the export list. Update both importing files. The helper extracts JSON from markdown code blocks in tool error responses using a regex: /```json\n([\s\S]*?)\n```/.

userStories.title: Clear dangling setTimeout in WebSocket connect patterns across E2E tests
userStories.description: As a platform developer, I want WebSocket connect patterns to clean up their timeout timers on success so that test infrastructure doesn't accumulate dangling timers.
acceptanceCriteria: All WebSocket connect patterns in e2e/ that use setTimeout with reject() also clearTimeout on success (onopen)
Each pattern stores the timeout handle in a variable and calls clearTimeout in the onopen callback
No setTimeout-with-reject patterns remain that do not clear the timeout on success
